plugins.name: dx-core
plugins.description: Full-stack development workflow for Azure DevOps projects — requirements, planning, execution, review, bug fixes, and PR management

plugins.name: dx-aem
plugins.description: AEM component verification, dialog inspection, demo capture, QA automation, and multi-platform project knowledge for Adobe Experience Manager projects

plugins.name: dx-hub
plugins.description: Multi-repo hub orchestration — run dx skills across sibling repositories from a single hub directory

plugins.name: dx-automation
plugins.description: Autonomous AI agents for ADO workflows — Definition of Ready checker, Definition of Done checker, DoD fixer, PR reviewer, PR answerer. Runs as ADO pipelines triggered by AWS Lambda webhooks.
